changes.rule: Daily report must show proven count, not claimed count

changes.change: Before running, check gsc-ui-indexing-proof-ledger.json for today's proven submissions
changes.rule: If today has 0 proven submissions and CloakBrowser is available, prioritize indexing

Step 3 (calculator indexing) now reads proof ledger, not day report summaries
changes.rule: Only count PROVEN_SUCCESS entries as submitted. CLAIMED_BUT_UNPROVEN are treated as unsubmitted.

changes.change: All daily reports must cite proof source (run log, terminal log, or screenshot path)
